title: Two-seed spatial-temporal NWP graph blend for group 3
rationale: The exact public lineage is saturated by sparse cross-group calibration. A graph encoder over the LDAPS/GFS grids plus a dilated 24-hour temporal head supplies a genuinely different physical NWP representation, while two independently trained seeds control neural variance.
expected_signal: A Q1/Q2-selected two-seed blend must improve score, 1-NMAE, and FICR for every seed and pass the locked H2 complete-issue-cycle month, season, and bootstrap contract as an ensemble.
risk_notes: This is a structural model blend and changes every group-3 row. Groups 1 and 2 remain byte-equivalent to the public best; policy selection never uses H2, and final test inference uses only competition-provided NWP.
